fields.title: Harden fs-policy against symlink/path traversal writes
fields.description: Update extensions/tau/src/sandbox/fs-policy.ts to detect symlink traversal escapes when evaluating write permissions, including non-existent targets and ancestor symlinks.
fields.notes: Implemented symlink traversal hardening in src/sandbox/fs-policy.ts: component-wise lstat/realpath checks, nearest-existing-ancestor resolution for non-existent targets, strict workspace symlink boundary enforcement, and retained .git/.pi protections. Added test/fs-policy.test.ts with 5 coverage cases (workspace escape deny, in-workspace symlink allow, read-only temp escape deny, .git symlink deny, normal temp allow). npm run gate passes.
